content: Lydia: By Diabella’s sweet tits, these nights in Riverwood make my nipples hard just thinking about MJR bending me over the smithy's forge. Fuck this liberal shithole, though—too many elves and Imperial milk-drinkers stinking up the place. Whiterun Guard: Keep your lusty thoughts to yourself, Lydia. Riverwood might not be a proud Nord stronghold, but at least the whores here don’t charge extra for beast races like they do in Whiterun. Lydia: Ha! Like I’d let some fur-backed Khajiit or stinking Orc near my Thane’s cock. I’d split their skulls wide open before they even got a chance to beg. MJR needs a proper Nord woman—with hips for breeding and tits built for worship, not some knife-ear slut. Whiterun Guard: Spoken like a true follower of Diabella. But don’t pretend you don’t drool when those bandit wenches ambush MJR, trying to snatch him for their fuck-pits. Half those bitches are Nords, and they fight dirtier than a troll in heat. Lydia: Gods, yes. Watching MJR punt those cum-hungry skanks into the river with his bow gets me so wet I could drown a skeever. Last time, he pinned one to a tree with an arrow through her cunt—still throbbing when I finished her off with my blade. Whiterun Guard: Fuck me, no wonder Serana’s always gagging for his attention. You two are worse than draugr in a tomb when it comes to marking your territory. Lydia: That undead slut? Pah. She couldn’t please a skeever if she lubed up with moon sugar. Bet she sucks like a horker—all teeth and disappointment. MJR deserves a woman who knows her place: on her knees, praising Talos while choking on his— Whiterun Guard: Enough! Disrespect the law, and you disrespect me. Even if the law’s just trying to sleep without hearing about your Than’s fucking conquests. Lydia: Fine, fine. Just saying, if he ever needs a proper warrior to ride into battle—and his cock—I’m ready to serve.
